source_jobs.title: Workplace Experience Intern
source_jobs.description:
At Shapr3D, we’re transforming how industries design and innovate. From automotive and aerospace to consumer tech and industrial design, our platform powers some of the boldest ideas across industries that shape 16% of the global GDP.


Our multi-platform product has earned the Apple Design Award and is regularly featured in Apple Keynotes. With Series B backing and a rapidly growing user base, we’re scaling fast - and this is your chance to be part of the journey.


"Our front desk is the heartbeat of our Budapest office: this is where first impressions are made, and where our team feels welcomed day in and day out. We're on the lookout for a real people person who can handle multitasking with grace, as well as come up with suggestions for how we might do things better. You'll be the point of contact for everything from visitor management to general office organization, and largely, you'll be free to mold this role into your own." - Adrienn Szőke, Head of Workplace




WHY THIS ROLE?

 - Be the heartbeat of our Budapest office: As the first point of contact, you’ll be the face of Shapr3D, ensuring smooth operations at the front desk while providing exceptional service to every employee and visitor who walks through our doors.

 - Elevate our daily work environment: You will play a key role in fostering a vibrant atmosphere by supporting special projects that enhance the visitor experience, assisting with office events, and autonomously identifying ways to improve our processes.

 - Join a culture where you matter: Engage with a diverse range of personalities across the company in a supportive, people-oriented environment where your proactive contributions directly impact the efficiency and happiness of the entire team.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Be the friendly face of our Budapest office, managing the front desk and welcoming employees, guests, and visitors.

 - Handle day-to-day employee needs efficiently or connect them with the right person when needed.

 - Support the Workplace Team with office organization, maintenance coordination, and administrative tasks.

 - Keep track of office initiatives, social events, and company activities to keep everyone informed.

 - Contribute to creating a positive, efficient, and well-organized workspace for the entire team.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - Fluency in both English and Hungarian. You're comfortable switching between both throughout the day.

 - Outstanding organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple tasks without breaking a sweat.

 - A genuine people-oriented mindset; you find joy in helping others and making their day easier.

 - A positive, supportive attitude that makes the office a better place to be.

 - Availability to work at least 24 hours a week (ideally 3 full 8-hour days). With a commitment of a year or more.

 - Currently enrolled as a student for at least the next 12 months.


WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE

 - Massive market, untapped potential – Shapr3D is disrupting a $70B+ CAD market. We’re not just iterating — we’re reimagining how millions of professionals design and build physical products.

 - A place to grow – Work alongside the industry’s best in a culture where bold thinking and continuous learning are the norm.

 - Inspiring environment – Work from our panoramic downtown office.


ABOUT SHAPR3D

We don’t just innovate - we redefine the status quo in 3D design. With a multi-platform product reshaping CAD, we’re on a mission to empower every creator, engineer, and designer around the globe. By joining us, you’ll contribute to a top-tier product that’s not only award-winning but also deeply loved by its users - from solo inventors to Fortune 500 teams.

 
 

Please submit your CV in English

source_jobs.title: Engineering Manager -  C++
source_jobs.description:
At Shapr3D, we’re transforming how industries design and innovate. From automotive and aerospace to consumer tech and industrial design, our platform powers some of the boldest ideas across industries that shape 16% of the global GDP.

Our multi-platform product has earned the Apple Design Award and is regularly featured in Apple Keynotes. With Series B backing and a rapidly growing user base, we’re scaling fast - and this is your chance to be part of the journey.


“Not many people know, but computer aided design (CAD) was one of the first use-cases of computers in the 1960s. Computation has become a lot more powerful since and CAD software continues to push these boundaries. We are solving problems that were not meant to be possible before. This requires such a profound understanding of technology and a persistent effort to learn more. It’s so fulfilling to see how much people grow along this journey.” - Ákos Kapui, CTO




WHY THIS ROLE?

 - Lead Innovation: You will lead a Core Modelling team, building the foundational CAD engine that defines the Shapr3D user experience across all platforms.

 - Shape a Critical Growth Phase: As we redefine enterprise relationships and scale globally, you will actively contribute to our strategic growth in a $70B+ market.

 - Impact Industries Globally: Drive the evolution of a product used by innovative engineering, design, and manufacturing teams worldwide, empowering industries that shape 16% of the global GDP.
   
   


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Regularly review and challenge engineering design documents, fostering an environment of collaborative problem-solving.

 - Build and mentor a high-performing engineering team focused on continuously delivering world-class products to our customers.

 - Contribute to strategic planning and execution as an integral part of the Engineering Leadership Team.

 - Act as a role model, championing leadership behaviors and cultivating a motivated, high-achieving team culture.
   
   


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - Proven experience as a Software Engineering Manager or Development Lead for a C++ team.

 - Deep understanding across a wide spectrum of software engineering fundamentals (computer architecture, operating systems, computer science, and algorithms).

 - Track record of building and scaling high-quality, high-throughput engineering teams.

 - Hands-on C++ development experience.

 - A product-first mindset, driven by user needs and data, with a commitment to continuous learning and ownership.

 - Experience with CAD is a significant advantage.
   
   


A SNEAK PEEK INTO OUR STACK...

 - Core CAD Engine: C++20

 - iPadOS/macOS: Swift

 - Windows: C# and XAML (UWP)

 - Rendering Engine: Metal APIs on Apple devices, DirectX11 on Windows
   
   


WHY YOU'LL LOVE WORKING HERE

Ownership & impact – Be part of a startup shaping the future of design and manufacturing, with equity options.

Relocation support – Full relocation package if you’re moving to Budapest, one of Europe’s fastest-growing tech hubs.

Learning & growth – Work alongside some of the industry’s best minds and continuously evolve your skills.

Comprehensive benefits – Private healthcare, life insurance, gym membership, and more.

Office-first culture – We believe in in-person collaboration to build something extraordinary.




ABOUT SHAPR3D

We don’t just innovate - we redefine the status quo in 3D design. With a multi-platform product reshaping CAD, we’re on a mission to empower every creator, engineer, and designer around the globe.

By joining us, you’ll contribute to a top-tier product that’s not only award-winning but also deeply loved by its users - from solo inventors to Fortune 500 teams.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - C++
source_jobs.description:
At Shapr3D, we’re transforming how industries design and innovate. From automotive and aerospace to consumer tech and industrial design, our platform powers some of the boldest ideas across industries that shape 16% of the global GDP.

Our multi-platform product has earned the Apple Design Award and is regularly featured in Apple Keynotes. With Series B backing and a rapidly growing user base, we’re scaling fast - and this is your chance to be part of the journey.




Interested in finding out what Shapr3D and Budapest have to offer? Check out this page! https://www.shapr3d.com/lps/relocate

 

“Our focus is on making sure that all our teams are empowered and incentivized to make decisions independently. People aren’t afraid of taking risks, setting ambitious goals, and in some cases, failing. We know how to learn from our mistakes.” - Ákos Kapui, Chief Technology Officer





WHY THIS ROLE?

Shape the future of CAD. As a Senior Software Engineer, you’ll contribute to the backbone of Shapr3D’s next-gen CAD engine. Your work will directly impact millions of users globally, transforming how they design and manufacture.


Drive innovation on a global scale. Play a key role in building a multi-platform, world-class application that helps companies revolutionise their industries.


Join at a pivotal moment: With ambitious plans and significant growth, you’ll be part of a mission-driven team creating solutions that define the future of design.





WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Build and enhance our cutting-edge CAD features, creating an unparalleled user experience across platforms

 - Develop world-class, testable, and maintainable code that continuously pushes boundaries

 - Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to align technical innovations with business goals

 - Play a key role in evolving our technical architecture and shaping the engineering excellence that defines Shapr3D
   


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - Strong proficiency in modern C++ and a proven track record of delivering high-quality software

 - Solid experience in architectural design and a strong understanding of algorithms, linear algebra, and geometry

 - A passion for building scalable, robust solutions that delight users

 - Bonus: Experience in mobile app development (especially iOS) or working in the CAD industry
   


OUR TECH STACK

 - Core CAD Engine: Written in C++20

 - iPadOS/macOS: Built in Swift

 - Windows: Developed with C# and XAML, shipped as Universal Windows Apps (UWP)

 - Rendering Engine: Uses Metal APIs on Apple devices and DirectX11 on Windows
   
   


WHY YOU'LL LOVE WORKING HERE

Ownership & impact – Be part of a startup shaping the future of design and manufacturing, with equity options.

Relocation support – Full relocation package if you’re moving to Budapest, one of Europe’s fastest-growing tech hubs.

Learning & growth – Work alongside some of the industry’s best minds and continuously evolve your skills.

Comprehensive benefits – Private healthcare, life insurance, gym membership, and more.

Office-first culture – We believe in in-person collaboration to build something extraordinary.




 


ABOUT SHAPR3D

We don’t just innovate - we redefine the status quo in 3D design. With a multi-platform product reshaping CAD, we’re on a mission to empower every creator, engineer, and designer around the globe.

By joining us, you’ll contribute to a top-tier product that’s not only award-winning but also deeply loved by its users - from solo inventors to Fortune 500 teams.

source_jobs.title: Future Shap(e)rs
source_jobs.description:
HERE AT SHAPR3D WE DON’T JUST INNOVATE. WE CREATE A NEW STATUS QUO IN 3D DESIGN.

To achieve this, we’re completely reimagining legacy computer-aided design (CAD) tools with an iconic, mobile-first product. We’re backed by top European VCs Point9 Capital and Creandum. 


We're constantly looking for talented individuals to join our team, so even if our current postings haven't piqued your interest, don't hesitate to hit us up. We are where we are because of the extraordinary people who build our product, so we are always happy to talk to experts whose ambition matches our vision.


"By joining us, you’ll get the chance to build and contribute to the success of a top-notch product. Shapr3D is well on its way to disrupting the 40-year-old CAD industry with our Apple Design Award winning app that gets regularly featured in Apple Keynotes. Yes. That's right. Shapr3D is one of those apps. But what we’re most proud of is the global user base that grows day by day." - István Csanády, CEO



We are an office-first company in a remote-first world. Why? Read more about it on our website (https://csi.pet/EGxz8)

If all this speaks to you and you’re up for reinventing 3D design for the 21st century, we should definitely talk!

 

 ***Please submit your CV in English***

source_jobs.title: Senior Growth Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
At Shapr3D, we’re transforming how industries design and innovate. From automotive and aerospace to consumer tech and industrial design, our platform powers some of the boldest ideas across industries that shape 16% of the global GDP.




Our multi-platform product has earned the Apple Design Award and is regularly featured in Apple Keynotes. With Series B backing and a rapidly growing user base, we’re scaling fast - and this is your chance to be part of the journey.





WHY THIS ROLE?

Define the paid track: Take ownership of our paid strategy, establishing the blueprint for how we scale user acquisition and revenue. You will be the internal authority, educating leadership and shaping our strategic direction with data-backed conviction.

Engineer scalable growth: Your mission is to unlock the next phase of our growth engine. Move beyond current budget constraints by identifying and proving scalable channels that demonstrably generate more revenue than they cost, moving us from limited to high investment.

Lead the PLG evolution: Join at a critical phase as we double down on our Product-Led Growth focus. You will lead core product acquisition efforts and directly influence our market approach for future product launches.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Operate with extreme independence, identifying critical growth opportunities and executing without a predefined manual.

 - Architect and implement strategies to increase marketing spend while consistently maintaining and improving ROI.

 - Educate and influence senior stakeholders, including the VP of Product, on the 'why' behind growth tactics, fostering a data-driven culture.

 - Drive the development of a scalable, profitable paid engine that justifies significant increases in marketing investment year-over-year.





WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - Seasoned expertise in Paid Growth, bringing deep knowledge we currently lack internally to operate with immediate impact.

 - A proven track record in PLG environments, with a strong focus on driving acquisition through product experiences rather than purely enterprise/ABM models.

 - An unyielding, data-driven mindset, obsessively proving the direct correlation between marketing spend and revenue generation.

 - The conviction to challenge assumptions and push back on suboptimal ideas, educating leadership with data-backed reasoning.

 - An educator's approach, capable of explaining complex paid mechanics to non-experts and fostering a shared understanding across teams.

 - Extreme independence and a 'figure it out' mentality, thriving in ambiguity and proactively charting the course.
   
   
   


WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE

Seamless relocation – We want the best talent globally. We provide a full package (Flights, Visa, Air BnB, Bonus) to get you to Budapest smoothly.

Massive market, untapped potential – Shapr3D is disrupting a $70B+ CAD market. We’re not just iterating — we’re reimagining how millions of professionals design and build physical products.

Ownership in a category-defining company – You won’t just be along for the ride — you’ll own a part of it. With equity options, your success is directly tied to the company you help scale.

A place to grow – Work alongside the industry’s best with a dedicated personal development budget and a culture where bold thinking and continuous learning are the norm.

Marathon, not a sprint – We’re building for the long haul. We offer paid sabbaticals (3 weeks after 3 years, 5 weeks after 5 years) so you can fully recharge.

Premium health support – We believe high performance requires being at 100%. We provide CIG private healthcare, 100% sick leave payment, and 3 extra days off when you just need to rest





ABOUT SHAPR3D

We don’t just innovate - we redefine the status quo in 3D design. With a multi-platform product reshaping CAD, we’re on a mission to empower every creator, engineer, and designer around the globe. By joining us, you’ll contribute to a top-tier product that’s not only award-winn

notes: Shapr3D is a design and innovation platform with a strong engineering focus, backed by Series B funding.
